pages_summary.description: Product specification sheet showing surface mount and flush mount parallelogram lift configurations with technical diagrams, specifications table, and company information
pages_summary.extracted_text: PARALLELOGRAM SPECIFICATIONS, SURFACE MOUNT, FLUSH MOUNT, Capacities 50,000, 75,000 & 100,000 lbs, Track Lengths 32', 35', 42' or 48', Approach Ramp Length 100", Overall Length (SM model) 34'6" to 56'4", Lifting Height (stroke) 63" SM or 79" FM, Lowered Height 13" on SM or 16" on FM, Track Width 32", Overall Width 109 1/2", Width Between Platforms 44", Lifting Speed 60 Seconds, Power Requirements 20 H.P. 220/440/575 volt 3 Phase motor, Horizontal Movement 36 1/8" @ full stroke, OPTIONAL EQUIPMENT, Rolling Jack/Jacking Platforms, Track Lighting, Air/Hydraulic Tire Dolly, Keyed Control Lock-Out, Stainless Steel Bases, Marine Paint (Rustoleum standard), Drive Thru Ramps, Track Tape Switch-Shut Off, Air Inflatable Movable Approach Ramps, SM = Surface Mount Model, FM = Flush Mount Model, THESE LIFTS CONFORM TO ANSI/ALI STANDARDS, MOHAWK LIFTS, Mohawk Lifts, LLC., P.O. Box 110, 65 Vrooman Ave, Amsterdam, NY 12010, (800) 833-2006, (518) 842-1431, FAX. (518) 842-1289, www.mohawklifts.com, REV 10/21
